label: US Tariff Rate on Chinese Imports
change: +120pp since Jan 2025; IEEPA tariffs struck by SCOTUS Feb 2026 but China rate maintained via Section 301
source: Office of the US Trade Representative

label: Average US Effective Tariff Rate
change: Down from 27% peak after SCOTUS struck IEEPA tariffs; 10% universal tariff now in effect via Section 122
source: Peterson Institute for International Economics / Tax Foundation

label: US GDP Growth Rate (Annual)
change: Goldman Sachs cut forecast 0.3pp due to Iran war oil shock
source: Goldman Sachs / Bureau of Economic Analysis

label: US Unemployment Rate (Feb 2026)
change: Rose from 4.1% after 92,000 jobs lost in February 2026; FOMC projects 4.4% by year-end; private employers cited DOGE impact for 63,583 layoffs
source: Bureau of Labor Statistics / Federal Reserve FOMC March 2026

label: US National Debt
change: +$16.6T since 2017; OBBBA adds est. $4.1T more over 10 years

label: Annual Federal Budget Deficit
change: +$0.4T from FY2024; OBBBA adds $4.1T over 10 years per CBO

label: Brent Crude Oil Price (Mar 28, 2026)
change: Surged from $106 to $108+ on March 26 as Houthis entered Iran war and Iran struck Saudi base; OECD doubled 2026 US inflation forecast to 4.2% from 2.8%; +35% since war began Feb 28

label: Dow Jones Industrial Average
change: Entered correction territory March 27 (-793 pts); all three major indexes down 7%+ month-to-date; S&P 500 hit seven-month low; driven by Iran war oil shock and escalating Houthi-Israel fighting

label: CPI Inflation Rate (Year-over-Year)
change: Goldman raised 2026 forecast +0.8pp to 2.9%; Iran war oil shock adding pressure
source: Bureau of Labor Statistics / Goldman Sachs

label: US Goods Trade Deficit (Annual)
change: Manufacturing trade imbalance rose under Trump despite tariffs; US imports from China fell ~50% by June 2025

label: US-China Trade Volume (Annual)
change: US imports from China fell ~50% by June 2025 vs year prior — lowest since 2009 financial crisis

label: Annual US Tariff Revenue
change: SCOTUS ruling Feb 2026 triggers ~$166B in IEEPA tariff refunds to businesses
source: US Customs and Border Protection / Treasury

label: Tariff Cost Per US Household (2026)
change: Largest US tax increase as % of GDP since 1993

label: US Crude Oil Production
change: +4.5M bbl/day since 2017; Iran war blocking 8M bbl/day of global supply via Hormuz

label: DOGE Claimed Federal Spending Cuts (1-Year)
change: One-year review: Cato found 'no noticeable effect on spending trajectory'; federal expenditures rose YoY; firings/rehiring cost est. $135B; IRS projects $500B in lost revenue

label: US Manufacturing Employment
change: -98,000 manufacturing jobs in Trump's first full year back; tariffs hurting manufacturers per BNN/PBS
source: Bureau of Labor Statistics / BNN Bloomberg
